howToCreate.question: How do I create a pet?
howToCreate.answer: From the main menu, tap "Create New Pet". Choose between a cat or dog, pick a name, gender, and coat color, then tap "Create Pet"!

petDies.question: Can my pet die?
petDies.answer: No! Your pet will never die. If stats drop too low, your pet becomes unhappy and may need a vet visit, but they always recover with care.

statsDecrease.question: Why do my pet's stats decrease?
statsDecrease.answer: Pet stats decrease naturally over time to simulate real pet care. Feed, bathe, and play with your pet regularly to keep them happy and healthy.

howToFeed.question: How do I feed my pet?
howToFeed.answer: Tap the "Feed" button on the home screen. Choose from kibble, fish, treats, or milk. Each food affects your pet differently!

howToBathe.question: How do I bathe my pet?
howToBathe.answer: Tap "Bath" and drag the sponge across your pet. Scrub 5 times to complete the bath and earn coins!

vetVisit.question: When should I visit the vet?
vetVisit.answer: Visit the vet when your pet's health drops below 60%. You can pay with coins or watch an ad for a free visit.

earnCoins.question: How do I earn coins?
earnCoins.answer: Earn coins by caring for your pet (feeding, bathing, playing, sleeping) and by playing mini-games. Watch ads to double your rewards!

miniGames.question: What are mini-games?
miniGames.answer: Mini-games are fun activities you can play to earn coins. Access them from the game selection screen. There are 30+ games to explore!

bestScore.question: How do best scores work?
bestScore.answer: Each mini-game tracks your best score separately. Try to beat your personal best each time you play!

doubleReward.question: What is the double reward?
doubleReward.answer: After completing pet care activities, you may be offered the chance to watch a short ad to double your coin reward. It's always optional!

language.question: How do I change the language?
language.answer: Go to the Menu screen and use the language selector to switch between English and Portuguese (Brazil).

dataLoss.question: Will I lose my data?
dataLoss.answer: Your pet data is saved locally on your device. If you sign in with Google, your data is also backed up to the cloud.

tips.title: Pro Tips
tips.tip1: Check your pet's energy before doing activities — a tired pet won't enjoy them!
tips.tip2: Watch ads to double coin rewards from pet care activities.
tips.tip3: Visit the vet early — it's cheaper to prevent illness than treat it.
tips.tip4: Play mini-games to earn extra coins for vet visits and wardrobe items.
tips.tip5: Sign in with Google to back up your pet data across devices.

support.title: Need More Help?
support.message: If you have questions not covered here, please visit our GitHub page or create an issue.
